metadata.name: Assign a Trouble Ticket at the Gate

description: A gate kiosk's printer stops working. The clerk needs to report the issue.

nodes.task_description: Identify that the printer at Lane 3 is not working.

expected_outcome.value: The clerk recognizes the hardware failure.

nodes.task_description: Create a new trouble ticket in the IT helpdesk system.

expected_outcome.value: A new ticket is created with the problem description 'Printer not working' and location 'Gate Lane 3'.

nodes.task_description: Assign the ticket to the on-site hardware support team.

expected_outcome.value: The ticket is assigned to the correct support queue for resolution.
